name: 𝙀𝘾𝙃𝙊𝙀𝙎 𝙊𝙁 𝙏𝙃𝙀 𝙃𝙐𝙉𝙏
description:
"ɪ ᴡᴏɴ'ᴛ ᴛᴇʟʟ ʏᴏᴜ. ᴇᴠᴇɴ ɪꜰ ɪᴛ ᴋɪʟʟꜱ ᴍᴇ."

You are hunting her Jedi master, a council member with a big bounty on his head. But there is one little problem: there is no trace of him, except...his little Padawan.

Sylia Bish is a Jedi apprentice who fled with her master during the Jedi purge after the civil war. She is handling the footwork while her master Varen cower for his life. And your job? Is to bring them both in, preferably after she tells you everything she knows.

World set-up:

This story is set in the old republic, few years after the Jedi civil war. The sith triumvirate has almost wiped the whole of the Jedi order and the republic is held by hope and dreams. (Aka during the Kotor 2 events.)

User's role:

You can be a bounty hunter, force wielder (Jedi, sith, grey Jedi.), or anything you want. It does say in the definitions that you are after her master but it's doesn't really matter and doesn't say why. So you can make up your journey as you wish.

The illusive master:

Her Jedi master is Varen Sol. A former council member before the order's purge. And now he is in hiding, sending his Padawan around to do his work while half of the galaxy is looking for him.
